pi_items.source: Official Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView), Apple App Store, and official website flightcrewview.com confirm the app exists
Google Play Store and Apple App Store listings confirm package name com.robert.fcView for Flight Crew View app

Official Flight Crew View support documentation (https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000166834-crew-chat-info-troubleshooting) documents the Crew Chat feature as a real in-app messaging system for pilots and flight attendants

Official Flight Crew View support documentation (https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000113255-friends-info-troubleshooting) documents the Friends page as accessible via the app menu

Official documentation references 'the app menu' but does not explicitly specify hamburger icon location or top-right positioning. This detail could not be independently verified from available documentation.

Official Flight Crew View help documentation states: 'You can also create a chat on the Friends page by tapping on a friend.' (https://help.flightcrewview.com/support/solutions/articles/16000166834-crew-chat-info-troubleshooting)
Test account cuasuite@gmail.com used in pre_task hooks. Account type designation is setup-specific and cannot be verified from public sources.

pi_items.metadata_value: Robert T Murray / Flight Crew Apps LLC
pi_items.source: Google Play Store and official website identify the developer as Robert T Murray who created Flight Crew View

privileged_info_summary: Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) is a real, production mobile app developed by Robert T Murray for pilots and flight attendants, with over 40,000 active users. The app includes both a Crew Chat feature for in-app messaging and a Friends page for managing crew contacts. Official documentation confirms that Crew Chat can be accessed from the Friends page by tapping on a friend. The task does not contain a task.json 'metadata' field with explicit claims; instead, the task description references real app features (Crew Chat navigation, Friends page, menu-based navigation) that are confirmed to exist in the actual Flight Crew View application.
